title: TaskTray Mode Evolution - Session 5-6
description: Iteration history: (1) Session 5 added -TaskTray switch, StartMinimized param, console messages, BAT passthrough. (2) Session 6 added exit confirmation dialogs, fixed log messages, tray icon always visible. Next iteration: Consider auto-lock vault when minimized to tray.
notes: Evolution tracking: Feature grew across 2 sessions. BAT files modified. Potential next: timer-based auto-lock when in tray mode for security.
